findings.text: Main exit on the east side is partially blocked by stacked pallets reducing the clear exit width.
Only one portable fire extinguisher visible across the 800 square metre floor, located near the office.
Cardboard packaging stored directly against the electrical distribution board.
Emergency exit signage is present and illuminated along the escape route.
Socket outlets on the packing line are not protected by a 30 mA residual current device.
Rotating drive shaft on the conveyor is exposed with no guard fitted.
Workers retrieve stock from a mezzanine edge that has no guard-rail or fall protection.
The forklift's lifting examination certificate on display expired fourteen months ago.
Basement loading bay entrance has no flood barrier and sits below the surrounding ground level.
